name: origin
description: Personal AI memory layer. Bundles the origin-mcp MCP server (auto-installed via npx) and adds 8 short-typed skills for the user-facing verbs: /origin:init, /origin:brief, /origin:capture, /origin:recall, /origin:distill, /origin:review, /origin:forget, /origin:handoff (alias: /origin:debrief). Talks to the local Origin daemon on 127.0.0.1:7878.
